description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, expansive glass windows, and multiple outdoor living spaces including a large wraparound deck and a covered patio supported by columns. The structure features a mix of white and gray exterior walls, with lush landscaping and a fenced yard surrounding the property. The front facade includes a double garage, a main entrance with a small staircase, and a landscaped path leading to the door. The upper floor has private balconies, a hot tub, and several seating areas, while the lower level offers shaded outdoor space and direct access to the garden. Large sliding glass doors and floor-to-ceiling windows provide ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The property is enclosed by a modern fence, with a driveway and green lawn completing the urban residential setting.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, wraparound decks, and landscaped outdoor areas, enclosed by a contemporary fence. Features include a double garage, multiple balconies, and lush greenery.
description_view_0: Side view showing the driveway, fenced yard, and the rear deck with outdoor furniture and a hot tub.
description_view_1: Back view highlighting the expansive deck, covered patio with columns, and large glass windows opening to the garden.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the garage doors, driveway, and a mix of greenery and outdoor seating on the deck.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance with a staircase, landscaped path, double garage, and symmetrical window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
